text: The sink and swim methods were inspired by the book Algorithms by Sedgewick and Wayne, Fourth Edition, Section 2.4.

chunk_id: docling_book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111_2
text: The structure accepts any type that conforms to the Comparable protocol. The single initializer allows you to optionally specify the sorting order and a list of starting values. The default sorting order is descending and the default starting values are an empty collection:
page: book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111

chunk_id: docling_book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111_3
text: /// Initialization var priorityQueue = PriorityQueue<String >(ascending: true) 1/1 Initializing with starting values priorityQueue = PriorityQueue<String > (ascending: true, startingValues: ["Coldplay", "OneRepublic", "Maroon 5", "Imagine Dragons", "The Script"]) var x = priorityQueue.pop () /// Coldplay x= priorityQueue.pop () /// Imagine Dragons
page: book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111

chunk_id: docling_book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111_5
text: The PriorityQueue conforms to sequence, collection, and IteratorProtocol, so you can treat it like any other Swift sequence and collection:
page: book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111

chunk_id: docling_book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111_6
text: extension PriorityQueue: IteratorProtocol { public typealias Element = T mutating public func next () -> Element? { return pop () } extension PriorityQueue: Sequence { public typealias Iterator = PriorityQueue public func makeIterator () -> Iterator & return self}
page: book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111

chunk_id: docling_book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111_7
text: This allows you to use Swift standard library functions on a PriorityQueue and iterate through a PriorityQueue like this:
page: book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111

chunk_id: docling_book_en_搬书匠-3299-Swift Data Structure and Algorithms-2016-英文版_page_111_8
text: for x in priorityQueue { print (x) } // Coldplay
